description: Complete specification for every Rafters component. This is the design target, not the current state. Every entry defines what MUST be provided for the component to be considered complete.

designRules.noLinkVariant: Link as a button variant is bad UX. No component ships a link variant. Use an anchor element styled independently.
designRules.noSizeScale: Components are designed for real interfaces. Default size only. Designers override with a reason, not a scale.
designRules.motionReduce: motion-reduce:transition-none on EVERY component with transitions. No exceptions.
designRules.tokenBased: Every component uses semantic color tokens, spacing tokens, radius tokens, typography tokens, shadow tokens as applicable.
designRules.interactiveStates: Every interactive component has: hover, focus-visible, active, disabled states with token-based styling.
designRules.formStates: Every form control has: aria-invalid, aria-required, aria-disabled, error state styling.
designRules.toggleStates: Every toggle has: aria-checked or aria-pressed with state styling.
designRules.disclosureStates: Every disclosure has: aria-expanded with state styling.
designRules.minimumContrast: 7:1 for normal text, 4.5:1 for large text, 3:1 for UI components. WCAG AAA.
designRules.depthModel: Overlays get z-depth tokens. Base-level components get height/shadows, not elevation.

section508.screenReaderLabel: native button semantics
section508.noColorOnly: icon + text variants available

section508.screenReaderLabel: aria-pressed communicates toggle state
section508.noColorOnly: visual + aria state indicator

section508.focusIndicator: visible ring 2px offset 2px on each item

section508.noColorOnly: visual + aria state indicator per item

section508.screenReaderLabel: associated label element via htmlFor or aria-labelledby
section508.noColorOnly: error icon + error text, not just red border

section508.noColorOnly: error icon + error text, not just red border

section508.noColorOnly: checkmark icon visible in checked state

section508.screenReaderLabel: switch role with associated label, state announced on toggle
section508.noColorOnly: position + color change, aria-checked announces state

section508.focusIndicator: visible ring 2px offset 2px on each radio
section508.screenReaderLabel: radiogroup role with aria-label, arrow keys for navigation
section508.noColorOnly: filled dot indicator in checked state

section508.focusIndicator: visible ring 2px offset 2px on trigger and active option

section508.screenReaderLabel: aria-valuetext for human-readable value, arrow keys for adjustment

section508.minTouchTarget: n/a (non-interactive, but clickable area activates associated control)
section508.screenReaderLabel: native label semantics with htmlFor association
section508.noColorOnly: required indicator is text asterisk, not just color

section508.screenReaderLabel: role=status when content changes dynamically
section508.noColorOnly: text content conveys meaning, not just color

section508.minTouchTarget: n/a (non-interactive, dismiss button if present must be 44px)

section508.screenReaderLabel: role=alert for urgent messages, aria-live for dynamic insertion
section508.noColorOnly: icon + text convey severity, not just color

aria.role: article or region when semantic grouping needed

section508.minTouchTarget: n/a (unless clickable, then entire card surface)

section508.screenReaderLabel: role=status with aria-label for screen reader announcement

section508.focusIndicator: ring on CTA button if present

section508.screenReaderLabel: meaningful alt text required, role=presentation for decorative images

section508.screenReaderLabel: native kbd element semantics

section508.noColorOnly: semantic elements convey hierarchy
